since_last: 33% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.71%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 33% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -1.92% · Gold -1.09% · Nasdaq100 -0.99%. 33% of 85 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.71%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.71%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -2.83%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +8.44%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +8.44%, VRT +8.25%, MRVL +6.97%, AMAT +6.82%, SMR +6.57%. Laggards: SPCX -7.76%, SNAP -7.07%, APP -5.48%, AI -5.03%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -7.76% at $194.98
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -7.76% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
